title: EdgeCacheEntry
description: KV value written by PromoteToEdgeCacheAction (services/click/consumers/edge_promotion.py) and served by the edge Worker. Key format: cache:{domain}:{short_code}, domain lowercased with no www prefix. Both sides are tested against fixtures.json — change entry shape, key format, fixtures, Python model, and Worker parsing only in lockstep.

type.description: Entry discriminator. v1 only emits 'redirect'; consumers MUST passthrough unknown types (forward compatibility for e.g. password_form).

url.description: Absolute destination URL to redirect to.

status.description: HTTP redirect status. v1 always writes 302.
